query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 

analytics_tier=*infrequent*

//| parse field="scanned_bytes_breakdown -> *)" as scanned_bytes_breakdown 
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown "Continuous" as  scan_c nodrop
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown "Frequent" as  scan_f nodrop
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as  scan_inf nodrop

// AGGREGATE TO GET STATS
///| parse " query -> *, scanned_partition_count -> " as the_real_query
//| sort execution_duration_ms
| ((query_end_time - query_start_time ) /1000 / 60 /60/24) as range_days
| parse regex field=query "(?i)(?<scope>(?:_datatier|_index|_view) *= *[a-zA-Z_]+)" nodrop
//| if (isempty(datatier),"index",datatier) as datatier

| count as queries,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as total_bytes,avg(range_days) as range_days,avg(scanned_partition_count) as partitions, sum(scan_c) as cont_scan,sum(scan_f) as freq_scan,sum(scan_inf) as infreq_scan, values(status_message) as statuses,values(query_type) as types by user_name,scope,query | limit 100 //,session_id

| round(cont_scan/1G,2) as cont_scan_gb
| round(freq_scan/1G,2) as freq_scan_gb
| round(infreq_scan/1G,2) as inf_scan_gb
| total_bytes / 1G as total_scan_gb
| round(inf_scan_gb * 0.016,2) as scan_credits //| fields -bytes

| fields -cont_scan,freq_scan,infreq_scan,total_bytes
| sort scan_credits

| scan_credits/queries as cr_per_query

sources.dashboardDescription: A dashboard for viewing search scan overview and trends
sources.panelTitle: Infrequent Queries Sorted By Scan Credits Estimate (@.016/scan GB)
